transcript:
CALLER: Hi, yeh child vaccination bhi karte hain kya aap log?
AGENT: Haan ji, humare paediatrics department mein vaccination services available hain. IAP recommended schedule ke anusaar vaccines diye jaate hain.
CALLER: Covid vaccine bhi milti hai?
AGENT: Ji, COVID-19 booster doses available hain eligible age groups ke liye. Please call karke current availability confirm kar lein.
CALLER: Aur flu shot — influenza vaccine — milta hai yahan?
AGENT: Haan, influenza vaccine bhi available hai. Aap walk-in bhi aa sakte hain vaccine ke liye, appointment mandatory nahi hai. Subah 9 se dopahar 1 baje ke beech aayein.
CALLER: Perfect. Kal aa jaate hain hum. Shukriya.
